title: Documentation notes no longer work
body:
### Issue Description

I have been following this documentation, https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/Introduction.html

The command `podman build -t nginx https://git.io/Jf8ol` does not work on my debian-stable system. Some URLs in that file no longer exist.

My system,
```
$ podman version
Version:      3.0.1
API Version:  3.0.0
Go Version:   go1.15.15
Built:        Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
$ 
```

I have also tried a more recent docker file from nginxinc/docker-nginx and this fails with other errors. Newer URL is https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nginxinc/docker-nginx/refs/heads/master/mainline/debian/Dockerfile but this looks like a different issue.


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Attempt to run podman build -t nginx https://git.io/Jf8ol as shown in doc https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/Introduction.html


### Describe the results you received

Describe the results you received

### Describe the results you expected

Describe the results you expected

### podman info output

```yaml
If you are unable to run podman info for any reason, please provide the podman version, operating system and its version and the architecture you are running.
```
